CurrentIssues.ID: FunctionNaming:ClearSentenceButton.kt$@Composable fun ClearSentenceButton( enabled: Boolean, onClick: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )
FunctionNaming:CommunicationScreen.kt$@Composable fun CommunicationScreen( viewModel: CommunicationViewModel, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )

FunctionNaming:CommunicationScreen.kt$@Composable private fun CommunicationScreenContent( state: CommunicationUiState, feedbackMessage: String?, onPictogramSelected: (Pictogram) -> Unit, onSentencePictogramTapped: (Int) -> Unit, onSpeakTapped: () -> Unit, onClearTapped: () -> Unit, onSyncRequested: () -> Unit, onDismissFeedback: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )
FunctionNaming:PictogramGrid.kt$@Composable fun PictogramGrid( pictograms: List<Pictogram>, onPictogramSelected: (Pictogram) -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, columns: Int = 2, )
FunctionNaming:PictogramGrid.kt$@Composable private fun PictogramCell( pictogram: Pictogram, onClick: () -> Unit, )
FunctionNaming:SentenceBuilderBar.kt$@Composable fun SentenceBuilderBar( sentencePictograms: List<Pictogram>, onPictogramTapped: (Int) -> Unit = {}, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )
FunctionNaming:SpeakButton.kt$@Composable fun SpeakButton( enabled: Boolean, isSpeaking: Boolean, onClick: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )

LongParameterList:CommunicationScreen.kt$( state: CommunicationUiState, feedbackMessage: String?, onPictogramSelected: (Pictogram) -> Unit, onSentencePictogramTapped: (Int) -> Unit, onSpeakTapped: () -> Unit, onClearTapped: () -> Unit, onSyncRequested: () -> Unit, onDismissFeedback: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )
